evidence_summary: Directional example: new waterproof-material claims and sustainability positioning appear across brand launches and retailer listings.
transferability: Relevant for Switzerland if performance, price, and trust signals are strong enough for alpine use.
recommended_action: Identify 5-10 rising brands, compare technical claims and price bands, then shortlist supplier conversations.
risks: Example row only. Needs real source URLs, performance validation, price checks, and local assortment coverage.

evidence_summary: Directional example: fit-specific footwear searches, reviews, and competitor filters indicate a possible underserved segment.
transferability: Potentially relevant in Switzerland if local competitors under-serve width, comfort, and size availability.
recommended_action: Scan competitor ranges, review demand signals, and test a focused buying expansion in high-need sizes.
risks: Needs real demand evidence, return-rate thinking, and supplier availability.

opportunity: Test fastpacking packs as a growing product type
evidence_summary: Directional example: fastpacking appears across specialist content, trail-running communities, and lightweight backpack launches.
transferability: Could fit Swiss customers who combine trail running, hut trips, and compact weekend routes.
recommended_action: Compare product formats, weights, volumes, and price bands, then recommend whether to test a small assortment.
risks: May remain niche; needs competitor availability, local event/community evidence, and margin assessment.
